MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-02-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. MARINA B. PITTS OF STUBBS & LEONE, TEL. NO. (925) 974-8600 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO COMMUNITY COLLEGE DISTRICT's MOTION TO STRIKE PUNITIVE DAMAGE CLAIMS FROM PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT is Denied as moot in light of the ruling on Plaintiff's Motion to File a First Amended Complaint. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/eg

Notice Of Motion And Motion To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Oct-02-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. MARINA B. PITTS OF STUBBS & LEONE, TEL. NO. (925) 974-8600 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF MIEKO SAITO's Motion To File First Amended Complaint is Granted. Plaintiff may file the proposed First Amended Complaint within 10 days of entry of this Order. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/eg
